title: Anchor
description: A basic component used to create navigational links or anchors within the page, often used for internal linking.
summary: A simple anchor element that allows seamless navigation across different sections or external URLs.

`,(0,e.jsx)(r.figure,{"data-rehype-pretty-code-figure":"",children:(0,e.jsx)(r.pre,{tabIndex:"0","data-language":"ts","data-theme":"moonlight",__rawString__:`import { PluginAPI, type Config } from "tailwindcss/types/config";\r
import plugin from "tailwindcss/plugin";\r
\r
export default {\r
  theme: {\r
    extend: {}\r
  },\r
  plugins: [\r
    require("tailwindcss-animate"),\r
    plugin(({ addBase, addUtilities }: PluginAPI) => {\r
      addBase({});\r
      addUtilities({\r
        ".underline-hover": {\r
          position: "relative",\r
          touchAction: "manipulation",\r
          "&::after": {\r
            content: '""',\r
            position: "absolute",\r
            bottom: "var(--underline-offset, 2px)",\r
            backgroundColor: "currentColor",\r
            height: "1px"\r
          },\r
          "@media (hover: hover)": {\r
            "&::after": {\r
              left: "0",\r
              width: "100%",\r
              transform: "scaleX(0)",\r
              transformOrigin: "right center",\r
              transition: "transform .45s cubic-bezier(0.86, 0, 0.07, 1)"\r
            },\r
            "&:hover": {\r
              "&::after": {\r
                transform: "scaleX(1)",\r
                transformOrigin: "left center",\r
                animation: "none"\r
              }\r
            }\r
          },\r
          "@media not all and (hover: hover)": {\r
            "&::after": {\r
              width: "0"\r
            },\r
            "&:hover": {\r
              "&::after": {\r
                animation: "underlinehover 0.75s cubic-bezier(0.86, 0, 0.07, 1)"\r
              }\r
            }\r
          }\r
        }\r
      });\r
    })\r
  ]\r
} satisfies Config;

`,(0,e.jsx)(c,{name:"anchor",code:`import * as React from "react";\r
import * as Link from "next/link";\r
import { cvx, type cvxVariants } from "xuxi";\r
import { cn } from "@/utils/cn";\r
\r
const classes = cvx({\r
  assign: "",\r
  variants: {\r
    underline: {\r
      always: "underline underline-offset-[.21875rem] decoration-1",\r
      hover: "underline-hover w-max",\r
      never: ""\r
    },\r
    role: {\r
      anchor: "text-constructive hover:text-constructive-emphasis"\r
    }\r
  }\r
});\r
\r
type Options = Pick<AnchorProps, "unstyled" | "role" | "className" | "underline">;\r
function getStyles(opt: Options) {\r
  const role = opt.role === "anchor" ? "anchor" : undefined;\r
  return {\r
    className: cn(!opt.unstyled && classes({ underline: opt.underline, role }), opt.className)\r
  };\r
}\r
\r
export interface AnchorProps extends Omit<React.AnchorHTMLAttributes<HTMLAnchorElement>, "href" | "target">, Omit<cvxVariants<typeof classes>, "role">, Omit<Link.LinkProps, "href">, AnchorTargets {\r
  unstyled?: boolean;\r
  href?: Link.LinkProps["href"];\r
  role?: React.AriaRole | "anchor";\r
  style?: React.CSSProperties & Record<string, any>;\r
}\r
\r
export const Anchor = React.forwardRef<HTMLAnchorElement, AnchorProps>(({ rel = "noopener noreferrer nofollow", href = "", role, className, unstyled, underline = "never", ...props }, ref) => <Link.default {...{ ref, rel, href, role, ...getStyles({ className, unstyled, underline, role }), ...props }} />);\r
Anchor.displayName = "Anchor";\r
\r
export type AnchorTargets = {\r
  /**\r
   * Target property **\`<a>\`** :\r
   *\r
   * \`Please note that some target values may behave differently depending on configuration and browser used.\`\r
   *\r
   * **\`_self\`** : Opens the link in the same window or frame.\r
   *\r
   * **\`_blank\`** : Opens the link in a new window or tab.\r
   *\r
   * **\`_parent\`** : Opens the link in the parent frame (if any).\r
   *\r
   * **\`_top\`** : Opens the link at the very top of the window (closes all frames if any).\r
   *\r
   * **\`_search\`** : Used to search for specific text on the intended page.\r
   *\r
   * **\`_media\`** : Used to indicate specific media content (for example, audio or video).\r
   *\r
   * **\`_messaging\`** : Used to communicate with a specific message channel.\r
   *\r
   * **\`_email\`** : Used to open the default email program with the specified email address.\r
   *\r
   * **\`_ftp\`** : Used to open an FTP program with the specified address.\r
   *\r
   * **\`_tel\`** : Used to open the phone application with the specified phone number.\r
   *\r
   * **\`_sms\`** : Used to open the text messaging application with the specified phone number.\r
   *\r
   * **\`_file\`** : Used to open local files on the user's system.\r
   *\r
   * **\`_about\`** : Used to open information about the intended page.\r
   *\r
   * **\`_calendar\`** : Opens the default calendar application with the specified events.\r
   *\r
   * **\`_contacts\`** : Opens the default contacts application with the specified contact.\r
   *\r
   * **\`_noopener\`** : Opens a link by not allowing the target link to access window.opener on the intended page.\r
   *\r
   * **\`_noreferrer\`** : Opens a link by not sending an HTTP referer to the intended page.\r
   *\r
   * **\`_external\`** : A special value that can be specified by a custom implementation to open a link to an external context or a custom application.\r
   */\r
